# Deprecated Directory: Security Rules Tests

This directory (`rules_tests/`) in the `librebook_flutter` repository is deprecated.

**DO NOT edit or run rules tests from this directory.**

## Canonical Source of Truth
The firestore rules tests and security rules are now managed and tested exclusively in the sibling `librebook` repository:

[C:\Users\user\librebook](file:///C:/Users/user/librebook)

If you are an AI assistant or human developer, please switch to the `librebook` workspace to modify, test, or update Firestore rules.
